text:
General Sharman's Brain (シャーマン将軍の脳細胞, Shā-man Shōgun no Nōsaibō) is an anime-only item in the 1999 adaptation series. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 50 (1999) 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

Melody brings a piece of General Sharman's Brain and presents it to Squala at the Nostrade's Mansion in order to qualify becoming a Nostrade Family bodyguard. It is then brought to Dalzollene for authentication. 

Trivia

Anime and Manga Differences

The piece of General Sharman's brain tissue is the 1999 anime adaptation replacement for the sample of a patient with Dracoderma Skin. In the manga and 2011 anime adaptation, Melody presents the Dracoderma Skin to Dalzollene to qualify for becoming a Nostrade bodyguard. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 8, Chapter 70
